subject: A: implement string_utils.py (reverse/is_palindrome/count_words)
description:
In v8_multiagent_demo/string_utils.py implement three pure functions:
- reverse(text: str) -> str
- is_palindrome(text: str) -> bool  (ignore case and non-alphanumeric chars)
- count_words(text: str) -> int  (split on whitespace)
Non-str input → TypeError.
Work is done inside worktree task-A-demo. When done, call complete_task so the system auto-delivers string_utils.py to task-B-demo.
